case_title: RONALD KONOPASKI VS. INCOME STRATEGIES INSTITUTE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KONOPASKI, RONALD AS TO DEFENDANT INCOME STRATEGIES INSTITUTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-06-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT INCOME STRATEGIES INSTITUTE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-06-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-06-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-06-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KONOPASKI, RONALD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT INCOME STRATEGIES INSTITUTE ALTHOUGH THE COURT DOES NOT AWARD MONEY DAMAGES, THE COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT TO EXTEND TO PLAINTIFF THE ABILITY TO ATTEND AND/OR ACCESS ITS TRAINING PROGRAM FOR ONE FROM THE DATE OF JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF KONOPASKI, RONALD
(SC-105)REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONOPASKI, RONALD AS TO DEFENDANT INCOME STRATEGIES INSTITUTE
SC 105 ANSWER FORM RETURNED UNDELIVERED. WAS RE SENT TO NEW ADDRESS PROVIDED BY POST OFFICE.
ORDER (SC-105A)ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER(SMALL CLAIMS): YOU MUST GO TO COURT IF YOU WANT TO BE HEARD. -COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT-
MOTION ON REQUEST FOR (SC-105)ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER DATED JULY 2, 2009. (COURTS OWN MOTION) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONOPASKI, RONALD HEARING SET FOR AUG-21-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC-105 ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT. SC-105 ANSWER FORM WAS RETURNED UNDELIVERED AND WAS RE SENT TO DEFENDANT TO ANOTHER ADDRESS.
SC-105A, ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER SENT TO DEFT RETURNED UNDLIVERED.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONOPASKI, RONALD
ORDER DATED AUG-18-2009 "GRANTED" ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE ON (SC-105A) COURTS OWN MOTION.

MOTION ON REQUEST FOR (SC-105) ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER DATED JULY 2, 2009. FILED BY INCOME STRATEGIES INSTITUTE SET FOR AUG-21-2009 IS CONTINUED TO SEP-03-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN 506. TO BE HEARD BY COMMISSIONER SLAVIT IN DEPT. 610.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT INCOME STRATEGIES INSTITUTE
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-03-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-03-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. CASE HEARD IN DEPT 610. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER, FILED. PER ORDER, THE EXISTING JUDGMENT IS AFFIRMED; PROVIDED, HOWEVER, THAT PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE AN ADDITIONAL ONE YEAR FROM THE DATE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER TO PARTICIPATE IN DEFENDANT'S EDUCATION AND TRAINING PROGRAMS--INCLUDING CONTINUED ONE-ON-ONE TRAINING, ATTENDANCE AT LIVE PROGRAMS OR CLASSES, AND/OR ON-LINE PROGRAMS OR TRAINING. IT IS THE RESPONSIBILITY OF EACH PARTY TO REMAIN IN CONTACT, PROVIDE EACH OTHER WITH TELEPHONE NUMBERS, EMAIL ADDRESSES, CURRENT WEBSITE ADDRESSES, AND OTHER MEANS OF COMMUNICATION, SO THAT PLAINTIFF MAY COMPLETE TRAINING PURSUANT TO THE EXISTING JUDGMENT AND WITHIN THE TIME ALLOTTED. COPIES OF ORDER SENT TO PARTIES.
ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER SC-105A RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO DEFENDANT.
THE MOTION ON REQUEST FOR (SC-105)ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER DATED JULY 2, 2009. OF SEP-03-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. CASE AJUDICATED ON SEPTEMBER 14, 2009.
